name: Undeployed blueprints
recommendation: Deploy or archive draft blueprints to keep the platform inventory clean.

name: Blueprint deployment failures
recommendation: Investigate failed blueprint deployments under Platform > Blueprints.

name: Stale blueprints (updated since last deploy)
recommendation: Re-deploy blueprints whose source has changed since the last successful deploy.

name: Compliance benchmarks with updates available
recommendation: Review benchmark updates and re-deploy when changes are acceptable.

name: Compliance benchmarks in MONITOR mode
recommendation: Move benchmarks from MONITOR to ENFORCE once results are validated.

name: Empty platform scope
recommendation: Add devices to the platform scope to receive blueprint and benchmark deployments.

name: Devices with failed DDM declarations
recommendation: Inspect Platform DDM Status for devices with unsuccessful declarations.
